details.test: Task 1: Order cheapest qualifying Angus semen
Task 2: Create breeding plan with top 3 bulls
Task 3: Book earliest afternoon genetic consultation
Task 4: Compare bulls and favorite best by docility/weaning weight
Task 5: Save beginner article on sexed semen in dairy heifers
Task 6: Build mixed order of heifer-safe beef bulls
Task 7: Select Wagyu embryo package and proceed to shipping
Task 8: Use herd genetic calculator and add top sire to breeding plan
Task 9: Create and save Spring 2026 breeding season plan
